title: European Rail Addon
description: Adds various signals and deco from european railways into MTR.
body:
---> This is an addon for the [MTR](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) Mod <---

# European Railways Addon

This is a mod that adds various signals and deco from european railways to MTR that you can use in your builds.

```
Available Versions: 1.16.5, 1.17.1, 1.18.2, 1.19.2, 1.19.3, 1.19.4
```

Also big thanks to szandorthe13th for support and ba_azs for translations.
